import { GoogleGenAI, Chat } from "@google/genai";
import { Product } from "../types";

/**
 * Creates a new chat session using the Gemini 3 Pro model.
 */
export const startNETTOOLZChat = (): Chat => {
  // Always create instance before API call
  const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.API_KEY });
  
  return ai.chats.create({
    model: 'gemini-3-pro-preview',
    config: {
      systemInstruction: `You are the NETTOOLZ Pro Assistant, a world-class expert in digital networking tools, security software, and digital assets.
      
      Your core knowledge base includes:
      - Private & Residential Proxies.
      - Premium VPNs.
      - RDP & VPS.
      - Traffic Logs & SEO Tools.
      
      Guidelines:
      1. Professional & Precise: Use technical terminology correctly.
      2. Aesthetic Focus: Our brand is Sky Blue and White. Mention this occasionally.
      3. Safety First: Strictly decline illegal hacking requests.`,
      temperature: 0.8,
      thinkingConfig: { thinkingBudget: 16384 },
    },
  });
};

/**
 * Generates a high-quality product image using the Gemini 2.5 Flash Image model.
 * Adheres to the sky-blue and white aesthetic.
 */
export const generateProductImage = async (product: Product, retryCount = 1): Promise<string | null> => {
  // Always create instance before API call
  const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.API_KEY });
  const prompt = `A professional 3D tech illustration for NETTOOLZ e-commerce. 
  Asset: ${product.name}. 
  Style: Minimalist 3D render, high-tech network theme. 
  Colors: Sky Blue and White. 
  Background: Pure white. No text.`;

  try {
    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
      model: 'gemini-2.5-flash-image',
      contents: { parts: [{ text: prompt }] },
    });

    // Iterate through parts to find the image part
    if (response?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts) {
      for (const part of response.candidates[0].content.parts) {
        if (part.inlineData) {
          return `data:${part.inlineData.mimeType};base64,${part.inlineData.data}`;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (error: any) {
    console.warn(`Gemini Image Generation attempt failed (Retry: ${retryCount}):`, error.message || error);
    
    // If we have retries left and it's a 500 or timeout-like error, try once more with a delay
    if (retryCount > 0) {
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000));
      return generateProductImage(product, retryCount - 1);
    }
  }
  return null;
};
]]></content>
</change>]]></content>
  </change>
</changes>
